# New Page — PetTransportGlobal

Before building, confirm:
1. Which page type? (route / country guide / origin hub / airline / breed / blog / resource)
2. Primary keyword target?
3. Which existing pages should this link to?

Then build following all conventions in `copilot-instructions.md`.

After completing, run the self-review checklist automatically (see `.github/prompts/self-review.prompt.md`).
Do not mark the task done until self-review passes.
